title: Man arrested after youngster dies in vehicle accident
description: GEORGE NEWS - A 33-year-old man was taken...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - A 33-year-old man was taken into custody following the death of a young woman in a vehicle accident in Pacaltsdorp on Saturday night, 8 March.

According to Southern Cape spokesperson Sgt Chris Spies, the accident happened in Mission Street.

"Reports available suggest that police were summoned to a scene where a 21-year-old pedestrian was hit by a vehicle. Upon arrival they found the victim who had sustained multiple injuries.


> "She was declared deceased by medical personnel on scene. The alleged driver of the vehicle was arrested," said Spies.


"The suspect is facing charges of culpable homicide and driving a motor vehicle whilst under the influence of liquor. He will appear in court once charged."

More information will follow as it becomes available.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
